commit_message_first_line: feat(popup): add section reorder with up/down buttons
_rescue_notes: SWE-rebench autogenerated test.sh fell back to overall pass-rate (FAIL_TO_PASS=[]) which was meaningless for a UI feature with no test coverage. Replaced with a manifest-driven test.sh that scores 7 structural F2P gates (typecheck + storage key + section array + up/down UI + move logic + scoped storage save + i18n keys). Stripped the 9 docs/vitepress entries from source_files since the canonical commit 753efcee covers only the popup-reorder slice (the docs vitepress GitChangelog plugin was a separate follow-up topic, commit 6a352da2, that the user simulator addresses in turns 4-5 and is NOT part of the primary popup-reorder task).
